title: Monarch's Gaze
description: Whenever you attack an enemy, it loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
smart_description: Whenever you attack an enemy, it loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
notes: The smart description's Strength loss scales with the power's stack count. With 2 stacks of Monarch's Gaze, enemies lose 2 Strength per attack; 3 stacks = 3 Strength loss, etc. This power triggers when the owner makes a powered attack.
